_comment: Build-verified elaboration-invisible keepers: each deletion was attempted and broke `lake build` even though the declaration is outside the term-level cone of the root (see CLAUDE.md, 'Elaboration-invisible dependency classes'). The detector subtracts these; every entry must name the failure that proved it.
IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.algeb: rfl-simp lemma consumed by the cone LiesOver instance's simp proof (AdicValuation.lean) without appearing in the proof term
IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicC: feeds the DVR instance cluster below; deletion broke NumberField/Completion/Finite.lean TC synthesis
parent of the PIR/DVR instances; deletion broke Finite.lean TC synthesis of IsDiscreteValuationRing 𝒪ᵥ
parent of the DVR instance; deletion broke Finite.lean TC synthesis
consumed by TC synthesis in Finite.lean cone declarations (IsDiscreteValuationRing 𝒪ᵥ)
the 𝒪[·]-spelled alias of the DVR instance; the form Finite.lean actually synthesizes
IntermediateField.smulCommClass_of_norma: instance consumed by TC synthesis then inlined; deletion broke AbsoluteGaloisGroup.lean (pass-3 build failure)
instMulSemiringActionSubtypeMemIntermedi: SMul supplier of smulCommClass_of_normal; deletion made it fail to elaborate
TateCurve.Blueprint.periodPair_ω₁: rfl-simp lemma consumed by simp in TateCurveConstruction proofs without appearing in proof terms (build-verified)
TateCurve.Blueprint.periodPair_ω₂: rfl-simp lemma consumed by simp in TateCurveConstruction proofs without appearing in proof terms (build-verified)
Ideal.Quotient.out_sub: consumed by kept WithZeroMulInt code; deletion broke the build (pass-1)
AddMonoidHom.continuous_iff_isOpen_ker: consumed by Deformations/Lemmas cone-adjacent code; deletion broke the build (pass-1)
WeierstrassCurve.r_eq_zero_of_u_eq_one: consumed by proofs in the same/adjacent module whose EXPORTED bodies hide the edge (module-system opaque exports); deletion broke the build
WeierstrassCurve.u_eq_one_or_eq_neg_one: consumed by proofs in the same/adjacent module whose EXPORTED bodies hide the edge (module-system opaque exports); deletion broke the build
WeierstrassCurve.negVariableChange_u: consumed by proofs in the same/adjacent module whose EXPORTED bodies hide the edge (module-system opaque exports); deletion broke the build
